components.name: spring-boot-starter-web
components.description: Starter for building web, including RESTful, applications using Spring MVC. Uses Tomcat as the default embedded container

components.name: spring-boot-starter
components.description: Core starter, including auto-configuration support, logging and YAML

components.name: spring-boot-starter-logging
components.description: Starter for logging using Logback. Default logging starter

components.name: log4j-to-slf4j
components.description: The Apache Log4j binding between Log4j 2 API and SLF4J.

components.name: snakeyaml
components.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java

components.name: spring-boot-starter-json
components.description: Starter for reading and writing json

components.name: jackson-datatype-jdk8
components.description: Add-on module for Jackson (http://jackson.codehaus.org) to support JDK 8 data types.

components.name: jackson-datatype-jsr310
components.description: Add-on module to support JSR-310 (Java 8 Date & Time API) data types.

components.name: jackson-module-parameter-names
components.description: Add-on module for Jackson (http://jackson.codehaus.org) to support introspection of method/constructor parameter names, without having to add explicit property name annotation.

components.name: spring-boot-starter-tomcat
components.description: Starter for using Tomcat as the embedded servlet container. Default servlet container starter used by spring-boot-starter-web

components.name: spring-boot-starter-data-jpa
components.description: Starter for using Spring Data JPA with Hibernate

components.name: spring-boot-starter-aop
components.description: Starter for aspect-oriented programming with Spring AOP and AspectJ

components.name: aspectjweaver
components.description: The AspectJ weaver applies aspects to Java classes. It can be used as a Java agent in order to apply load-time weaving (LTW) during class-loading and also contains the AspectJ runtime classes.

components.name: spring-boot-starter-jdbc
components.description: Starter for using JDBC with the HikariCP connection pool

components.name: jakarta.persistence-api
components.description: Eclipse Enterprise for Java (EE4J) is an open source initiative to create standard APIs, implementations of those APIs, and technology compatibility kits for Java runtimes that enable development, deployment, and management of server-side and cloud-native applications.

components.name: hibernate-commons-annotations
components.description: Common reflection code used in support of annotation processing

components.name: classmate
components.description: Library for introspecting types with full generic information including resolving of field and method types.

components.name: byte-buddy
components.description: Byte Buddy is a Java library for creating Java classes at run time. This artifact is a build of Byte Buddy with all ASM dependencies repackaged into its own name space.

components.name: jaxb-core
components.description: JAXB Core module. Contains sources required by XJC, JXC and Runtime modules.

components.name: txw2
components.description: TXW is a library that allows you to write XML documents.

components.name: spring-data-jpa
components.description: Spring Data module for JPA repositories.

components.name: spring-data-commons
components.description: Core Spring concepts underpinning every Spring Data module.

components.name: spring-boot-starter-validation
components.description: Starter for using Java Bean Validation with Hibernate Validator

components.name: hibernate-validator
components.description: Hibernate's Jakarta Bean Validation reference implementation.

components.name: checker-qual
components.description: checker-qual contains annotations (type qualifiers) that a programmer writes to specify Java code for type-checking by the Checker Framework.

components.name: jjwt-api
components.description: JSON Web Token support for the JVM and Android

components.name: jjwt-impl
components.description: JSON Web Token support for the JVM and Android

components.name: jjwt-jackson
components.description: JSON Web Token support for the JVM and Android

components.name: jackson-databind
components.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

components.name: jackson-annotations
components.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

components.name: jackson-core
components.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

components.name: lombok
components.description: Spice up your java: Automatic Resource Management, automatic generation of getters, setters, equals, hashCode and toString, and more!

components.name: spring-dotenv
components.description: Provides a Dotenv property source for Spring and Spring Boot

components.name: dotenv-java
components.description: Environment based config for the JVM
